examples: He would attach a cable around the chassis of the car and winch it up on to the canal bank.
Daimler-Benz owned the company then and had the good grace to place the Chrysler chassis on a Mercedes axle.
The first anti-protest vehicle equipped was built on Mercedes chassis, and already had a large water cistern in the back.
You then hire carpenters, plumbers and electricians to build a small house on the chassis.
Chrysler will pay the suppliers for each painted body and rolling chassis they produce.
